'''Selong Lian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and a member of the [[Warrior caste]]. He served as the aide to [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] while he was stationed aboard the ''[[Sunulok]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
